rationale: Contradiction/completeness lens, whole branch @21374bb8. C+B honored: 0 BranchExistsE, 0 show-ref in internal Go, gitutil byte-unchanged vs origin/main. Option B is additive: runWorktreeEnumerationLeg ADDS a gate leg; FindOrphanedClosedBeads is now a thin wrapper delegating to ScanOrphanedClosedBeads and discarding the error, reproducing byte-identical behavior (incl. mixed-list case) for the unchanged complete/next/doctor consumers, all of which still call the fail-open wrapper. Single-settlement-home holds: runOrphanObligationGate REFUSES only, computes no Allow/Block, writes no panel metadata; implAdvisorySlotLine is read-only tally that omits on error, uses UnresolvedVerdicts() in lockstep with the gate's vote state. ADR-0030 intact: no injected FinalizeEpic seam, executor does not import complete, approve->executor edge is pre-existing (FinalizeEpic caller). All 4 OQs resolved [x]. Three residuals honestly disclosed in Non-Goals (raw-merged-no-obligation; blp6 cross-spec; two-List window); ADR scopes refusal to 'detectably unsettled' and discloses the trust-boundary pair — no overclaim, no undisclosed residual. All 12 AC-named tests homed; build/vet/gofmt/tests green across touched pkgs + consumers. No pairwise contradiction found.

findings.note: ADR-0037 amendment names 'two residuals' (raw-merged-no-obligation + raw bd close) while the spec Non-Goals discloses three (adds blp6 cross-spec + the two-List concurrency window). Not a contradiction: the ADR scopes to §8 trust-boundary residuals; blp6 (a different spec's orphan, outside the epic-scoped reach the ADR claims) and the serialization-bounded concurrency window are implementation/scope residuals fully disclosed in Non-Goals. Reach claim ('every merging lifecycle verb', scoped to detectable) is consistent with the shipped gate.

C+B verified: grep BranchExistsE=0, show-ref in internal Go=0, git diff origin/main -- internal/gitutil empty. branchExistsFn stays the unchanged bool in both core and wrapper; absent-or-infra reads as no-trigger, backstopped by AC11/AC12 + the AC13 worktree-enum leg keyed off the same bd worktree list source FinalizeEpic merges from.

Single-settlement-home confirmed in code: gate emits only guard.NewFailure with mindspec complete <bead> recovery (truthful branch-state variant for the R3 branch-less case); no PanelGateDecision/refutation write in approve. Advisory leg degrades to omission, never a pass or crash.
